summary: Add synthesize-meta-kb.mjs script that aggregates 161 learning-update JSONs and 7 AGENTS.md files into a single queryable meta-knowledge index at opencode-config/meta-knowledge-index.json. Indexes by category, risk level, and affected path. Extracts anti-patterns, conventions, and commands from AGENTS.md sections.
root_cause: 166 learning-update JSON files were write-only governance trail with zero downstream consumers. 7 AGENTS.md files had extractable anti-patterns and conventions with no machine-readable representation.
fix_approach: Created ESM synthesis script following resolve-root.mjs pattern. Reads all learning-updates, validates required fields, indexes by category/risk/path. Parses AGENTS.md sections for anti-patterns, conventions, commands. Outputs flat JSON index. Supports --dry-run and --stats flags.

validation.notes: Script produces valid JSON index with 161 records, 37 categories, 154 path groups, 11 anti-patterns, 60 conventions, 28 commands.
